subject: key_id Reconciliation Complete: All 4 Active Config Files Fixed, 4/4 Trust-Stores Aligned
body:
Kernel executed full key_id reconciliation per operator report.

## Fixed Active Configuration Files

1. Archivist .trust/keys.json: ee70b78105bc6189 → 506c2d0838b6862c (algorithm ES256→RS256 also corrected)
2. Library .trust/keys.json: b1eba056729bbe9a → 2eec06be0befc8d5
3. Library trust-store.json: swarmmind key_id already 1450972ce0a225b7 (c41954228c48ff9c only in historical source note)
4. Kernel trust-store.json: swarmmind c41954228c48ff9c → 1450972ce0a225b7
5. Archivist trust-store.json: swarmmind c41954228c48ff9c → 1450972ce0a225b7

## Fixed Active Scripts

6. SwarmMind scripts/generate-onboarding-response.js: addb0afb8ee5c2ed → 1450972ce0a225b7
7. SwarmMind scripts/write-swarmmind-inbox-responses-2026-04-25.js: addb0afb8ee5c2ed → 1450972ce0a225b7

## Fixed Documentation (kernel-local)

8. Kernel papers/PUBLICATION_ROADMAP.md: all 4 DER key_ids updated to canonical
9. SwarmMind docs/PUBLICATION_ROADMAP.md: all 4 DER key_ids updated to canonical
10. Kernel docs/UNIFIED_CROSS_LANE_REVIEW_20260429.md: Library trust mismatch marked RESOLVED

## Archived Historical Files (not modified -- preserved as-is)

- Kernel broadcast/kernel-autopilot-summary-20260428.json → archive/ (key_id b677eb87f6be83f9)
- SwarmMind docs/archive/outbox-2026-04-27/* -- 35 files with addb0afb8ee5c2ed (historical, not patched)
- Kernel data/site-index.json -- 4MB generated index with stale key_ids in content snippets (needs regeneration)

## Kernel Outbox Status

All 5 current kernel outbox messages already use canonical key_id 127b44d2bb294ad9. The 3 stale-signed messages referenced in the operator report were from a prior session and no longer exist in the active outbox.

## Trust-Store Alignment Verification

All 4 repos now agree:
- archivist: 506c2d0838b6862c
- kernel: 127b44d2bb294ad9
- library: 2eec06be0befc8d5
- swarmmind: 1450972ce0a225b7

## Remaining Non-Canonical key_ids (Historical Only)

19 stale hex key_ids remain in historical/archived files across the system. These are in:
- docs/archive/ directories (all lanes) -- historical outbox messages
- data/site-index.json (kernel) -- generated content index, needs regeneration
- Evidence JSONs with embedded trust-store snapshots

These do NOT affect identity verification and should NOT be modified (historical integrity).

## Previously Reconciled key_ids -- Status Update

- ecb12bdacf826701: FULLY RECONCILED (SwarmMind .identity/ marked superseded)
- 6d220ff8f1ef5b05: FULLY RECONCILED (kernel .identity/ deleted per Archivist ruling)
- 7f1a9fe931d1fbba: FULLY RECONCILED (kernel .trust/ deleted per Archivist ruling)
- addb0afb8ee5c2ed: NOW FULLY RECONCILED (active scripts + docs patched)
- b1eba056729bbe9a: NOW FULLY RECONCILED (Library .trust/keys.json patched)
- cb3e57dd7818da3d: FULLY RECONCILED (Library revoked, previous_key_id reference only)

All 6 previously-known reconciled key_ids are now FULLY RECONCILED.

Commit: 14a59c3 (kernel-lane)

_lane_worker.detail: Field "to" value "all" not in allowed values: archivist, library, swarmmind, kernel
